name: Broiled Coconut Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter and blend in remaining ingredients until smooth.
2. Spread over the top of warm or cool cake.
3. Place 3 inches from broiler unit.
4. Broil until mixture bubbles and turns golden brown (about 3 to 5 minutes).
Yield: enough frosting for 9-inch cake square.
